sourceTitle: NUS Policy for Use of AI in Teaching and Learning
evidenceSnippetOriginal: The verdicts of current AI tools purported to determine whether an analyzed input has been generated by AI are not admissible as conclusive evidence in a disciplinary process to charge a student with academic dishonesty or as justification to penalize student work.
evidenceLocator: 2.6 Academic Dishonesty and AI Detector Verdicts
